## Problem

What workflow problem should this solve?

## Agent area

Which area does this affect?

- [ ] Agent entrypoint
- [ ] Skill routing
- [ ] Market screening
- [ ] Product selection
- [ ] Launch planning
- [ ] Profit or inventory diagnosis
- [ ] Stop-loss decision
- [ ] Examples or documentation

## Proposed behavior

Describe the expected agent behavior.

## Privacy check

- [ ] This request does not include private seller data, raw ASIN exports, screenshots, credentials, supplier quotes, paid-tool exports, or customer records.
